recent_changes.description: Refactored Zalo OAuth from Mini App token flow to Social API v4 (authCode + PKCE). ZaloService: exchangeAuthCode() + getUserInfo(). DTO: authCode+codeVerifier. ZMA: getAuthCode() instead of getAccessToken()+getPhoneNumber(). exchangeAuthCode works, getUserInfo still blocked by IP.
Tested Coolify VPS (zo-dut-can-be.duckdns.org): SSL untrusted (Let's Encrypt not provisioned) + 502 Bad Gateway (container not running). Port 443/80 reachable on 157.245.156.189.

Debug endpoint revealed: graph.zalo.me blocks non-Vietnam IPs. Vercel IP 50.19.136.196 (US) → error -501: 'Personal information is limited due to IP address not inside Vietnam'. appsecret_proof was correct.

Initial Zalo OAuth implementation: ZaloService (verifyAccessToken + decryptPhoneNumber with appsecret_proof), AuthService.zaloLogin, ZMA login page redesign (Zalo primary, phone fallback), zalo-auth.ts service, zaloLoginActionAtom.

errors_encountered.error: Zalo graph.zalo.me error -501: Personal information is limited due to IP address not inside Vietnam: 50.19.136.196
errors_encountered.solution: Vercel server is in US. Need Vietnam VPS or alternative approach (getUserInfo on frontend). Tried Social API v4 — exchangeAuthCode works but getUserInfo via graph.zalo.me still blocked.

errors_encountered.error: Zalo SDK authorize rejected by user (code -201)
errors_encountered.solution: User clicked negative button on permission popup. Normal behavior — user must accept permissions.

errors_encountered.error: Coolify VPS SSL untrusted + 502 Bad Gateway
errors_encountered.solution: Let's Encrypt not provisioned yet. Container not running (likely missing env vars). Need to check Coolify deployment logs.

errors_encountered.error: Typo in variable name: appsecretProof vs appSecretProof

decisions_made.decision: Switch from Mini App token flow to Social API v4 (authCode + PKCE)
decisions_made.reason: Attempt to bypass IP restriction. oauth.zaloapp.com NOT blocked (works), but graph.zalo.me STILL blocked.

decisions_made.decision: ZALO_APP_ID = Zalo App cha (4243775393589850681), ZMA APP_ID = Mini App con (1756817649065317309)
decisions_made.reason: App Secret belongs to parent Zalo App, not Mini App. Different IDs for different contexts.

decisions_made.decision: Considered 3 options for IP issue: (A) getUserInfo on frontend, (B) VPS Việt Nam, (C) Zalo ID-only login
decisions_made.reason: User cannot find Vietnam VPS. Option A (frontend getUserInfo) is most practical next step.

decisions_made.decision: Coolify on DigitalOcean Singapore as alternative hosting
decisions_made.reason: User already has this setup. But Singapore IP may also be blocked by Zalo.
